data.title: ACLU Joins Coalition Calling For FIFA to Uphold Human Rights Ahead 2026 World Cup
data.summary: The coalition has issued a travel advisory for fans, players, journalists, and other visitors attending the 2026 World Cup in areas impacted by the Trump administration’s militarized immigration crackdown.

data.title: Municipalities: Beware of Changes in Flock’s Legal Terms if You’re Using or Considering License Plate Readers
data.summary: A flurry of Flock contract changes disempower customers

data.title: ‘My Child is Now a Political Debate’: Immigrant Families Respond as Arguments Wrap in Landmark Challenge against Trump’s Birthright Citizenship Threats
data.summary: Families share how Trump’s birthright citizenship executive order upended their hopes, and forced them to consider early births or leaving the U.S.

data.title: More than a Dozen Wrongful Arrests Due to Police Reliance on Facial Recognition Technology
data.summary: One ACLU client spent six months in jail, because police relied on facial recognition technology to incorrectly identify her as a suspect. She’s the fourteenth person known to be wrongfully arrested due to the technology’s failures.

data.title: ACLU Leads Fight to Limit Overbroad Digital Search Warrants
data.summary: ACLU litigation is leading courts to rethink warrants seizing our digital devices, social media accounts and other data to reinforce our Fourth Amendment protections.
